name: Ashforge Citadel
identity: Central fortified seat of Psanan where Great House rule, forge prestige, and civic renewal ceremony visibly converge.
approach: Black-red ramparts, forge smoke, and ash-banner civic markers announce a city accustomed to heat, rebuilding, and rule.
inside: Citadel courts, dedication halls, memorial arches, and weapon forges sit beside plazas made for public processions and ember dances.
expected_behavior: treat rebuilding markers and dedication fires as public obligations
faith: ancestral volcanic honor is visible, while renewal custom remains civic and household rather than temple doctrine
seasonal_change: Midyear renewal observances and cooling periods sharply alter labor, ceremony, and transit.

sensory_surface.detail: Black-red ramparts, forge smoke, and ash-banner civic markers announce a city accustomed to heat, rebuilding, and rule.
Citadel courts, dedication halls, memorial arches, and weapon forges sit beside plazas made for public processions and ember dances.

social_expectation_surface.detail: treat rebuilding markers and dedication fires as public obligations

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually Great House retainers, forge laborers, civic vow officers, and public conduct is read through expectations such as respect House precedence, treat rebuilding markers and dedication fires as public obligations.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by Great House Citadel Circle, Forge Dedication Halls, Rebuilding Oath Courts.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Ashforge Citadel stands apart because its economy leans on weapons forging, civic metallurgy; public faith remains visible through ancestral volcanic honor is visible, while renewal custom remains civic and household rather than temple doctrine; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble those scorning civic renewal custom, unlicensed descent raiders.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Ashforge Citadel begin through house capital rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
scene_openers: A first arrival at Ashforge Citadel immediately highlights central fortified seat of psanan where great house rule, forge prestige, and civic renewal ceremony visibly converge
The quickest social read of Ashforge Citadel comes from how locals react to respect House precedence / treat rebuilding markers and dedication fires as public obligations.
social_misstep_examples: Treating Ashforge Citadel like a casual stop rather than a governed space.

Escalation into law, tariff, or faction attention if ignored
outsider_advantage: Outsiders can sometimes notice pressure fractures in Ashforge Citadel before residents admit them.
outsider_liability: Outsiders in Ashforge Citadel are judged quickly by whether they understand its governing rhythms.

arrival_variants_by_time.dawn: At dawn, Ashforge Citadel feels procedural and watchful as daily rhythms set.
arrival_variants_by_time.midday: By midday, Ashforge Citadel is busiest and least forgiving of confusion.
arrival_variants_by_time.night: At night, Ashforge Citadel reveals who really moves after formal structures thin out.

recent_local_change_signal: Locals in Ashforge Citadel mention that something small but important has changed in the last few weeks, even if they refuse to name it directly.
